g.text: Train preference accuracy and margin over 960 steps - UltraFeedback-binarized pairs, beta 0.5

text.tspan: Conclusion: the preference margin climbs steadily while train accuracy saturates; the accepted checkpoint
is step 600, where held-out preference accuracy peaks at 67.4%.
